title: Write consolidated agent metadata migration plan

log.context: Write consolidated agent metadata migration plan

Now I have a clear picture of all the systems. Let me write the plan.

---

**Goal:** Replace three disconnected agent-tracking stores (flat task JSON files, token-usage.db, and the live /api/subagents scrape of the filesystem) with a single SQLite database that is the authoritative record for every agent run, its cost, and its task context.

---

**Schema**

Three tables, one database (suggest `/mnt/data/data/agents.db`):

`agents` — one row per subagent invocation
